items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of timestamp and GPS coordinates associated with signatures. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for timestamp and GPS coordinates, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
